mapper.sql: id, leakCode, leakName, leakType, leakLevel, leakDesc, leakSourceInfo, remark, status, trackStatus, trackedTime, disabled, assetIds, customInfo, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into af_industry_leak (leakCode, leakName, leakType, leakLevel, leakDesc, leakSourceInfo, remark, status, trackStatus, trackedTime, disabled, assetIds, customInfo, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime) values (#{leakCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{leakName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{leakType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{leakLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{leakDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{leakSourceInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trackStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{trackedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT}, #{assetIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customInfo,jdbcType=JSON}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into af_industry_leak
leakCode,
leakName,
leakType,
leakLevel,
leakDesc,
leakSourceInfo,
remark,
status,
trackStatus,
trackedTime,
disabled,
assetIds,
customInfo,
createBy,
createTime,
updateBy,
updateTime,
#{leakCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{leakName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{leakType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{leakLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{leakDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{leakSourceInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{trackStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{trackedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{disabled,jdbcType=BIT},
#{assetIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{customInfo,jdbcType=JSON},
#{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update af_industry_leak
leakCode = #{leakCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
leakName = #{leakName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
leakType = #{leakType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
leakLevel = #{leakLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
leakDesc = #{leakDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
leakSourceInfo = #{leakSourceInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
trackStatus = #{trackStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
trackedTime = #{trackedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
disabled = #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT},
assetIds = #{assetIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(IFNULL(customInfo, "{}"), #{customInfo,jdbcType=JSON}),
createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update af_industry_leak set leakCode = #{leakCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, leakName = #{leakName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, leakType = #{leakType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, leakLevel = #{leakLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, leakDesc = #{leakDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, leakSourceInfo = #{leakSourceInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, trackStatus = #{trackStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, trackedTime = #{trackedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, disabled = #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT}, assetIds = #{assetIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(IFNULL(customInfo, "{}"), #{customInfo,jdbcType=JSON}), createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

trim.if: ( l.leakCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.leakName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.leakType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.leakLevel like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.leakDesc like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.leakSourceInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.remark like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetIds like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )

mapper.select:
select * from af_industry_leak as l
l.id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
l.leakCode = #{leakCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.leakName = #{leakName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.leakType = #{leakType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.leakLevel = #{leakLevel, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.leakDesc = #{leakDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.leakSourceInfo = #{leakSourceInfo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.remark = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.status = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.trackStatus = #{trackStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
l.trackedTime = #{trackedTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
l.disabled = #{disabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
l.assetIds = #{assetIds, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.customInfo = #{customInfo, jdbcType=JSON} AND
l.createBy = #{createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.createTime = #{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
l.updateBy = #{updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.updateTime = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND

select count(1) from af_industry_leak as l
l.id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
l.leakCode = #{leakCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.leakName = #{leakName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.leakType = #{leakType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.leakLevel = #{leakLevel, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.leakDesc = #{leakDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.leakSourceInfo = #{leakSourceInfo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.remark = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.status = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.trackStatus = #{trackStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
l.trackedTime = #{trackedTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
l.disabled = #{disabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
l.assetIds = #{assetIds, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.customInfo = #{customInfo, jdbcType=JSON} AND
l.createBy = #{createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.createTime = #{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
l.updateBy = #{updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.updateTime = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND

select JSON_SET(IFNULL(l.`customInfo`, "{}"), '$.statusName', bd.basicDataName, '$.trackStatusName', bd2.basicDataName ) as customInfo, l.* from af_industry_leak as l left join `fnd_basic_data` bd on l.`status` = bd.`basicDataId` and bd.`dataTypeCode` = 'processStatus' left join `fnd_basic_data` bd2 on l.`trackStatus` = bd2.`basicDataId` and bd2.`dataTypeCode` = 'trackStatus'
l.id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
l.leakCodelike concat("%",= #{model.leakCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
l.leakName like concat("%", #{model.leakName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
l.leakType = #{model.leakType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.leakLevel = #{model.leakLevel, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.leakDesc like concat("%", #{model.leakDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
l.leakSourceInfo = #{model.leakSourceInfo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.remark like concat("%", #{model.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
l.status = #{model.status, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.trackStatus = #{model.trackStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
l.trackedTime = #{model.trackedTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
l.disabled = #{model.disabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
l.assetIds = #{model.assetIds, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.customInfo = #{model.customInfo, jdbcType=JSON} AND
l.createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
l.updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
( l.leakCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.leakName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.leakType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.leakLevel like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.leakDesc like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.leakSourceInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.remark like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetIds like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )

select count(1) from af_industry_leak as l
l.id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
l.leakCodelike concat("%",= #{model.leakCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
l.leakName like concat("%", #{model.leakName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
l.leakType = #{model.leakType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.leakLevel = #{model.leakLevel, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.leakDesc like concat("%", #{model.leakDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
l.leakSourceInfo = #{model.leakSourceInfo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.remark like concat("%", #{model.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
l.status = #{model.status, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.trackStatus = #{model.trackStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
l.trackedTime = #{model.trackedTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
l.disabled = #{model.disabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
l.assetIds = #{model.assetIds, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.customInfo = #{model.customInfo, jdbcType=JSON} AND
l.createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
l.updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
( l.leakCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.leakName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.leakType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.leakLevel like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.leakDesc like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.leakSourceInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.remark like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetIds like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
